subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen addresseth all the emigrants from the Land of Ṣád who have been scattered by the tyranny of the oppressors and have chosen exile [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی جمیع مهاجرین ارض صاد را که از ظلم ظالمان متفرق شده اند و غربت اختیار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
